use_cases: Display team members or collaborators on a project or document
Show user mentions in comments or chat interfaces
Represent members in a group or channel
Show assignees or reviewers in workflow systems
ai_summary: A reusable avatar group component that displays multiple user profiles in a stacked, overlapping layout with smooth hover animations and tooltip labels. Built with Radix UI primitives for accessibility, featuring scale, lift, and shadow effects on interaction. Ideal for team displays, collaboration features, and user representation in SaaS, education, and healthcare applications.
